scoreDescriptions.grounding: Reflects how well coverage is grounded in verifiable sources and references.
scoreDescriptions.integrity: Combines accuracy, sourcing, and bias indicators into a single integrity band.
scoreDescriptions.avgGrounding: Average grounding score calculated over the set of documents in focus.
scoreDescriptions.avgIntegrity: Average integrity score calculated over the set of documents in focus.
scoreDescriptions.eventGrounding: Average grounding score across the event cluster.
scoreDescriptions.eventIntegrity: Average integrity score across the event cluster.
scoreDescriptions.claimGrounding: Shares how resolved claims within the article cluster align with supported, disputed, or mixed verdicts.
scoreDescriptions.factuality: Measures how fact-driven the coverage is relative to available evidence.
scoreDescriptions.sourcingQuality: Scores how transparent and reputable the cited sources are.
scoreDescriptions.editorialization: Highlights the degree of opinionated framing versus straight reporting.

lowSampleTooltip: Fewer than 20 documents were available for this bucket; treat the score as advisory.

gapReasonNames.INSUFFICIENT_TIER_FOR_RISK: Insufficient evidence tier for claim risk
gapReasonNames.WEAK_CONFLICT: Conflicting evidence but neither side strong enough

legend.stripExplanation: The colored bar on each article represents its segments, left to right. Each cell is colored by its evidence-alignment label:
legend.limitationsText: All results reflect alignment between extracted claims and retrieved evidence at analysis time. They do not constitute definitive judgments of truth. Scores are probabilistic statistical signals, not editorial or legal determinations.
legend.groundingShort: 0–100 — Proportion of segments backed by actual evidence
legend.groundingDetail: Measures evidence coverage: what fraction of segments have supported, contradicted, or mixed verdicts. Segments with no evidence (Unknown) lower the score.
legend.integrityDetail: Supported segments contribute positively, contradicted segments incur a 1.2× penalty, mixed segments contribute lightly. Deliberately conservative — contradictions outweigh supports.
legend.sentimentShort: −1 to +1 — Emotional tone of the language
legend.sentimentDetail: Aggregated from per-segment analysis. Presented as supplementary context and does not factor into grounding or integrity calculations.

ideology.label: Ideology
ideology.insufficientSignalTooltip: Not enough politically-relevant stances were extracted to compute a reliable ideology score.
ideology.noData: No ideology data available for this article.
